name: Deepak Tripathi
title: AI-Driven DevOps Architect | Platform Engineering | MLOps | Multi-Cloud
summary:
AI-driven Platform & DevOps Architect with 15+ years of experience designing and operating large-scale distributed systems across cloud and enterprise environments.

Strong background in Kubernetes, multi-cloud platforms, CI/CD, and scalable infrastructure, with growing expertise in AI/ML systems, MLOps, and AI-driven automation.

Experienced in building production-grade platforms for data-intensive and compute-heavy workloads, enabling reliability, scalability, and high-performance systems aligned with modern AI architectures.

skills.AI / ML Systems & MLOps: Model deployment pipelines, AI system automation, data workflows, monitoring
skills.Cloud & Distributed Systems: AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, OpenShift, Terraform
skills.DevOps & CI/CD: GitHub Actions, Jenkins, GitLab CI, ArgoCD
skills.Infrastructure & Networking: Cloud networking, scalable systems design, distributed architectures
